commentaries.author: Douay Rheims 1609
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh 1 Chronicles 4:28 And they dwelt at Beer-sheba, and Moladah, and Hazar-shual, Douay Rheims 1609 Howbeit our Lord the God of Israel chose me of all the house of my father, to be king over Israel for ever: for (a) of Juda he chose the princes: moreover of the house of Juda, my fathers house: and of the sons of my father, it pleased him to choose me king over all Israel. (a) So Jacob prophesied, that the royal scepter should come to the tribe of Juda, and therein remain till Christ.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
